message:
Merge PR #2726: fix(polecat): use local git excludes for ephemeral worktrees

Writes Gas Town ignore patterns to .git/info/exclude instead of tracked
.gitignore. Stops polluting the working tree with Gas Town-specific
gitignore entries. Uses git rev-parse --git-dir for proper worktree support.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2726
Author: corymhall
